title: Aathi Ena Nee English Meaning Lyrics Kaththi Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Aathi Ena nee English Meaning
Movie: Kaththi
Music: Anirudh
Singer: Vishal Dadlani,
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Aathi en nee paaththa udaney
kaaththil vacha iragaanen.
kaattu marama valarndha ivano
yeththi vecha melugaanen.

kora pulla or nodiyil
vaanavillaa thirichaaye.
paarakalla marunodiyil
eera mannaa kolachaaye.

ye ooru azhagi ulaga azhagi
yaarumilla unna pola
vaadi nerungi paapom pazhagi

un azhagil,
en idhayam
than nilayai marandhu marandhu
konjidavum minjidavum
varugudhu urugudhu.

un vazhiyil
en payanam
vandhadaya nadandhu nadandhu
anjidavum injidavum
sedharudhu padharudhu (3)

Saami sela polae pirandhu
boomiyile nadandhaaye
dhoosiyena kannil vilundhu
aaruyiraai kalandhaaye

Kaal mulacha rangoliyaa
nee nadandhu vaara pulla.
kallu patta kannaadiyaa
naan udanju poren ulla

Jadayaula dhevadhayaa
minjudura azhagaaga
paarvayila vaasanaya
thoovidura vasamaaga

ooru azhagi ulaga azhagi
yaarumilla unna pola
vaadi nerungi paapom pazhagi

Aathi en nee paaththa udaney
kaaththil vacha iragaanen.

un vazhiyil

anjidavum injidavum
sedharudhu padharudhu (3)		 English Translation
I tried my best :)
once you saw me, oh my god
I feel I'm a feather in air
though grown like a forest tree
I became like a ignited candle.

With in a second - you
spinned hay into a rainbow
with in a second- you
shattered a rock into sand

hey beautiful, world’s beauty
no one here like you
come closer, lets live together

coz of your beauty
my heart has
forget its state and
trying to prattle and
overrun on you.

to join your path,
my journey is
walking to reach you,
feeling terrified and
frightened.

born like a goddess statue
you walked in earth.
Felt as a dirt in eyes
you dissolved in my soul.

Like a Rangoli with legs
you’re coming in the streets.
like a mirror hit with a stone
am getting shattered inside.

like an angel - you
glitter beautifully
like a fragrance - you
shower it from your eyes

hey beautiful, world’s beauty
no one here like you
come closer, lets live together

once you saw me, oh my god
I felt as a feather in air.
though grown like a forest tree
I became like a ignited candle.

coz of your beauty
my heart has
forget its state and
trying to prattle and
overrun on you.

to join your path,
my journey is
walking to reach you,
feeling terrified and
frightened.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the lead actors in the movie Kaththi?

The lead actors are Vijay and Samantha Ruth Prabhu.

Who composed the music for the song Aathi Ena Nee?

The music was composed by Anirudh Ravichander.

What is the theme of the song Aathi Ena Nee?

The song portrays deep romantic emotions and the essence of love.

When was the movie Kaththi released?

The movie was released in the year 2014.

Who performed the vocals for the song Aathi Ena Nee?

The song was sung by Vishal Dadlani.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Aathi Ena Nee from the movie Kaththi, released in 2014, features the lead pair Vijay and Samantha Ruth Prabhu. This romantic duet, composed by Anirudh and sung by Vishal Dadlani, beautifully conveys the emotions of love and longing. The lyrics and melody create a soothing and heartfelt atmosphere, making it a memorable addition to Tamil cinema's musical repertoire. The song resonates with listeners, evoking feelings of passion and connection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Aathi Ena Nee from the movie Kaththi is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Composed by Anirudh and sung by Vishal Dadlani, this song showcases a harmonious blend of soulful lyrics and captivating music. Experience the magic of this romantic number that resonates with the heart.
stanzaMeanings: Once you saw me, I felt like a feather in the air. Though I grew strong like a forest tree, I became like a lit candle. Within a moment, you turned hay into a rainbow and shattered a rock into sand. Hey beautiful, world's beauty, there's no one like you. Come closer, let's live together. Because of your beauty, my heart forgets its state and tries to prattle and overflow towards you. To join your path, my journey walks to reach you, feeling terrified and frightened. Born like a goddess statue, you walked on earth. Felt like dust in my eyes, you dissolved into my soul. Like a Rangoli with legs, you're coming in the streets. Like a mirror hit with a stone, I'm getting shattered inside. Like an angel, you glitter beautifully. Like a fragrance, you shower it from your eyes. Hey beautiful, world's beauty, there's no one like you. Come closer, let's live together. Once you saw me, I felt like a feather in the air. Though I grew strong like a forest tree, I became like a lit candle. Because of your beauty, my heart forgets its state and tries to prattle and overflow towards you. To join your path, my journey walks to reach you, feeling terrified and frightened.
